title: Kevin Michael Richardson

'''Kevin Michael Richardson''' is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] voice actor who provided the voices of several ''Star Wars'' characters, such as [[Jolee Bindo]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', [[K'Kruhk]] in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure|Jabba]] the [[Hutt]] in the film [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]. He also voiced [[Mace Windu]], a character portrayed in the [[prequel trilogy]] by [[Samuel L. Jackson]], in [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s.

He worked with [[Lucasfilm Animation]] again on the film [[Wikipedia:Strange Magic (film)|''Strange Magic'']], and for [[LucasArts]] on the games [[Wikipedia:Indiana Jones and the Emperor's Tomb|''Indiana Jones and the Emperor's Tomb'']] and [[Wikipedia:RTX Red Rock|''RTX Red Rock'']].

He followed in [[Mark Hamill]]'s footsteps as the voice of The Joker on the WB series ''The Batman'' opposite [[Rino Romano]]. From 2012 to 2017, he was the voice of Shredder in Nickelodeon's [[Wikipedia:Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2012 TV series)|''Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles'']].

{{Bio-stub}}
